query:
SELECT configKey, 
  CASE 
    WHEN configValue IS NULL OR configValue = '' THEN '⚠️ EMPTY'
    WHEN isSensitive = 1 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(configValue, 8), '••••••••', RIGHT(configValue, 4), ' (', LENGTH(configValue), ' chars)')
    ELSE configValue
  END as value_preview,
  isSensitive,
  description,
  updatedAt
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey LIKE 'TWILIO%'
ORDER BY configKey;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute SELECT configKey, 
  CASE 
    WHEN configValue IS NULL OR configValue = '' THEN '⚠️ EMPTY'
    WHEN isSensitive = 1 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(configValue, 8), '••••••••', RIGHT(configValue, 4), ' (', LENGTH(configValue), ' chars)')
    ELSE configValue
  END as value_preview,
  isSensitive,
  description,
  updatedAt
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey LIKE 'TWILIO%'
ORDER BY configKey;

rows.description: Twilio phone number in E.164 format e.g. +14125551234
Per-phone static OTP overrides (JSON map of phone->code)
When true, OTP is always 123456 (disable before going live)
